ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batch_mixers" (
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch mixer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the batch mixer */,
  "basic_batch_size" TEXT /* Basic batch size of the mixer */,
  "basic_production_rate" INTEGER /* Basic production rate in tph (tons per hour) */,
  "batch_size_range_lb" TEXT /* Range of nominal batch sizes in pounds */,
  "production_rate_range_tph" TEXT /* Range of nominal production rates in tph */,
  "live_zone_in" INTEGER /* Size of the live zone in inches */,
  "mixer_width_in" INTEGER /* Width of the mixer in inches */,
  "motor_size_hp" TEXT /* Estimated motor size in horsepower */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the mixer was manufactured */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mixer (e.g., active, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the mixer within the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production schedule */,
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch mixer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production schedule */,
  "batch_size" TEXT /* Batch size for the production schedule */,
  "production_rate" INTEGER /* Production rate in tph for the production schedule */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the production is scheduled */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor responsible for the production schedule */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the production schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_schedules_mixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixer_id") REFERENCES batch_mixers ("mixer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_schedules_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raw_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raw material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the raw material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the raw material */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the raw material per unit */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for reordering the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raw material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the raw material in inventory */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Minimum level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES raw_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch mixer */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_mixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixer_id") REFERENCES batch_mixers ("mixer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the production process */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch mixer */,
  "specification" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_specs_mixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixer_id") REFERENCES batch_mixers ("mixer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch mixer ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of batch mixers ordered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_mixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixer_id") REFERENCES batch_mixers ("mixer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative assigned to the customer */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch mixer */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., production, energy) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_mixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixer_id") REFERENCES batch_mixers ("mixer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production log */,
  "mixer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch mixer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "batch_size" TEXT /* Batch size produced */,
  "production_rate" INTEGER /* Production rate achieved */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality assessment of the produced batch */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who produced the batch */,
  "machine_hours" REAL /* Total machine hours used for the production */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed during the production */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the production log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_mixer_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixer_id") REFERENCES batch_mixers ("mixer_id")
)
